SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE PROC [EDW_DUN].[SP_UNI_REF_MAPPING_LOAD_ByPattern_ALL] @Source [NVARCHAR](32) AS

BEGIN
--#################################################
--##	Stored Procedure To Unify the Landing data 
--##	against Pattern Matches BY Divisions.
--##
--##	This SP Differs from  ALL Divisions
--##	on below places highlighted with ***Differs
--#################################################



--######### This table will hold the data on Which rule is Mapped to which Landing data at the end of Stored Procedure 

DECLARE @ReF_ID INT  = (select Max(UNI_REFID) as REFID from EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING);
--DECLARE @Source NVARCHAR(32) ='LP';

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING') IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
	DROP TABLE #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING;
	END;


 CREATE TABLE #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING
 (SRC_UNI_MetaID  INT,
 UNI_LandID  BIGINT,
 UNI_RuleID  INT,
 SRC_PK  NVARCHAR(32),
 MappingInd  NVARCHAR(32)
 );


--######### This table holds all the MetaData table data where a Sequence is generated based on which Loop Meta will Run


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA') IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
		DROP TABLE #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA;
		END;
		

		SELECT  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TableName) AS ROW_NUM_META,M1.* 
		INTO #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA
		FROM 
			(
				SELECT A.* FROM EDW_DUN.UNI_TABLE_METADATA A
				JOIN (SELECT Table_Name,Column_Name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE Table_Schema='EDW' ) B  -- Added Information Schema Check
				ON A.TableName=B.Table_Name
				AND A.TablePKColumn_EDW = B.Column_Name
				JOIN EDW_DUN.UNI_STG_LANDING L 
				ON A.UNI_MetaID = L.UNI_MetaID
				
			) M1 
			
			JOIN 
			
			(SELECT Table_Name,Column_Name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE Table_Schema='EDW' ) M2   -- Added Information Schema Check
			
			ON M1.TableName=M2.Table_Name
			AND M1.TableColumnName = M2.Column_Name

		WHERE IsActive=1
		AND SourceSystem= @Source;
	
	

--######### This table holds all the Landing data excluding the Mapped data loaded in REF table from Previous Process

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UNI_STG_LANDING') IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
	DROP TABLE #T_UNI_STG_LANDING;
	END;
	
	
	SELECT 
	L.UNI_LandID,
	L.UNI_MetaID,
	L.TablePK_EDW,
	L.MappingInd
	INTO #T_UNI_STG_LANDING
	FROM EDW_DUN.UNI_STG_LANDING L
	LEFT JOIN EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING  R
	ON L.UNI_MetaID = R.UNI_MetaID
	AND L.TablePK_EDW = R.TablePK_EDW
	WHERE COALESCE(R.MappingInd,'NA')!='MAPPED';  -- Exclude Landing data loaded in REF table in Previous Process



-- ###### Counter to loop through MetaData Table based on Generated sequence
-- ############## OUTER LOOP META  START HERE#############

DECLARE @META_Counter INT = 1;

WHILE @META_Counter <= (SELECT MAX(ROW_NUM_META) FROM #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA)
BEGIN
    --Meta Loop
    DECLARE @TableName NVARCHAR(256) = (SELECT CONCAT('EDW.', TableName) FROM #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA WHERE ROW_NUM_META = @META_Counter);
    DECLARE @TablePK NVARCHAR(256) = (SELECT TablePKColumn_EDW FROM #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA WHERE ROW_NUM_META = @META_Counter);
    DECLARE @UNI_MetaID NVARCHAR(32) = (SELECT UNI_MetaID FROM #T_UNI_TABLE_METADATA WHERE ROW_NUM_META = @META_Counter);
    DECLARE @SQL_SRC_1 NVARCHAR(MAX);
    DECLARE @SQL_SRC NVARCHAR(MAX);
	DECLARE @SQL_DELTA NVARCHAR(MAX);
    DECLARE @FinalSQL NVARCHAR(MAX);


	
	-- ###### Rulebook Temp table is generated Per Meta Loop [ 1 Table & 1 Column to Be unified   = Rule Sequencing is done based on RulePriority )
	
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UNI_RULEBOOK') IS NOT NULL
	BEGIN
        DROP TABLE #T_UNI_RULEBOOK;
    END;
	
	

    SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY R.RulePriority, R.TableName, R.TableColumnName, R.UnifiedValue) AS ROW_NUM
        ,R.UNI_RuleID
        ,R.UNI_MetaID
        ,R.SourceSystem
        ,R.Division
        ,R.RulePriority
        ,R.RuleValue
    INTO #T_UNI_RULEBOOK
    FROM EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF R
    WHERE R.MatchType = 'PATTERN'
        AND R.Division = 'ALL'  --***Differs from BY Division Here
        AND R.SourceSystem = 'LP'
        AND R.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
        AND R.IsActive = 1
        AND R.UNI_MetaID = @UNI_MetaID; -- Per MetaID  -- New Rule table is generated
		
		
		
		
	-- ###### Counter to loop through all the Rule per MetaData field
	-- ############## INNER LOOP RULE  START HERE#############
	

    DECLARE @Rule_Counter INT = 1;

    WHILE @Rule_Counter <= (SELECT MAX(ROW_NUM) FROM #T_UNI_RULEBOOK)
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @RuleValue NVARCHAR(4000) = (SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(' ( ',RuleValue),' )') FROM #T_UNI_RULEBOOK WHERE Row_NUM = @Rule_Counter); --***Differs from BY Division Here
        DECLARE @UNI_RuleID NVARCHAR(32) = (SELECT UNI_RuleID FROM #T_UNI_RULEBOOK WHERE Row_NUM = @Rule_Counter);

        SET @SQL_SRC_1 = N'SELECT ' + @UNI_MetaID + N' AS SRC_UNI_MetaID, L.UNI_LandID, ' + @UNI_RuleID + N' AS UNI_RuleID,' + QUOTENAME(@TablePK) + N' AS SRC_PK, L.MappingInd FROM ' + @TableName + N' SRC';
        SET @SQL_SRC = @SQL_SRC_1 + N' JOIN #T_UNI_STG_LANDING L ON SRC.' + @TablePK + N'=L.TablePK_EDW ';
		SET @SQL_DELTA = @SQL_SRC + N'LEFT JOIN #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING TGT ON TGT.SRC_UNI_MetaID =' + @UNI_MetaID + N' AND TGT.SRC_PK=' +  QUOTENAME(@TablePK)
        SET @FinalSQL = N'INSERT INTO #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING ' + @SQL_DELTA + N' WHERE  TGT.SRC_UNI_MetaID IS NULL AND L.UNI_MetaID=' + @UNI_MetaID + N' AND ' + @RuleValue;
		
		
		--SELECT @FinalSQL
        EXEC (@FinalSQL); -- Final generated SQL used to query the Source table using data from Rule table

        SET @Rule_Counter = @Rule_Counter + 1;
		
		
		
		-- ############## INNER LOOP RULE  ENDS HERE#############
    END;

    SET @META_Counter = @META_Counter + 1;
	
	
	-- ############## OUTER LOOP META END HERE#############
	
	

END;


	INSERT INTO EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING
	
	
	SELECT 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY UNI_LandID) + ISNULL(@REF_ID,0) AS UNI_REFID,
	UNI_RuleID,
	SRC_UNI_METAID,
	SourceSystem,
	Division,
	TableName,
	TablecolumnName,
	TABLEPK_SRC,
	TablePK_EDW,
	TableColumnValue,
	TableColumnValueDesc,
	MatchType,
	UnifiedValue,
	UnifiedValueDesc,
	UnifiedValue_Group,
	UnifiedValue_Category,
	MappingInd,
	CreatedByProcess,
	CreatedTS,
	LastUpdatedTS
	FROM 
	(	
		SELECT 
			A.UNI_LandID,
			MIN(A.UNI_RuleID) AS UNI_RuleID,
			A.SRC_UNI_METAID,
			L.SourceSystem,
			L.Division,
			L.TableName,
			L.TablecolumnName,
			L.TABLEPK_SRC,
			L.TablePK_EDW,
			L.TableColumnValue,
			L.TableColumnValueDesc,
			R.MatchType,
			R.UnifiedValue,
			R.UnifiedValueDesc,
			R.UnifiedValue_Group,
			R.UnifiedValue_Category,
			'MAPPED' as MappingInd,
			'NA' as CreatedByProcess,
			Getdate() as CreatedTS,
			Getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
		FROM #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING A
			JOIN EDW_DUN.UNI_STG_LANDING L on A.UNI_LandID=L.UNI_LandID
			JOIN EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF R ON A.UNI_RuleID = R.UNI_RuleID
			Where R.UnifiedValue is NOT NULL 
			AND A.MappingInd='NEW'
			
			GROUP BY 
			A.UNI_LandID,
			A.SRC_UNI_METAID,
			L.SourceSystem,
			L.Division,
			L.TableName,
			L.TablecolumnName,
			L.TABLEPK_SRC,
			L.TablePK_EDW,
			L.TableColumnValue,
			L.TableColumnValueDesc,
			R.MatchType,
			R.UnifiedValue,
			R.UnifiedValueDesc,
			R.UnifiedValue_Group,
			R.UnifiedValue_Category
			
			) M1;
		
		
		
		
	UPDATE A1
	SET A1.MatchType = R.MatchType,
	A1.UNI_RuleID = R.UNI_RuleID,
	A1.UnifiedValue = R.UnifiedValue,
	A1.UnifiedValueDesc = R.UnifiedValueDesc,
	A1.UnifiedValue_Group = R.UnifiedValue_Group,
	A1.UnifiedValue_Category = R.UnifiedValue_Category,
	A1.MappingInd ='MAPPED',
	A1.LastUpdatedTS = GETDATE()
	FROM  EDW_DUN.UNI_REF_MAPPING A1
	JOIN  #T_UNI_LANDING_RULE_MAPPING A2
	ON A1.Uni_MetaID = A2.SRC_UNI_METAID
	AND A1.TablePK_EDW = A2.SRC_PK
	JOIN EDW_DUN.UNI_RULEBOOK_XREF R ON A2.UNI_RuleID = R.UNI_RuleID
	WHERE A1.MappingInd='UNMAPPED';	
	
	
		
END;
GO
